message:
test(ftui-tty): PTY and panic-cleanup lifecycle tests (bd-lff4p.4.7)

Add 6 additional PTY-based lifecycle tests verifying:
- cursor hide/show on session enter/exit
- alt-screen enter/leave via PTY
- per-feature disable sequences on drop
- termios restoration after panic with features enabled
- repeated raw-mode enter/exit cycles with no state leak
- cleanup sequence ordering (sync_end < cursor_show < alt_screen_leave)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
